title: Engineering Manager — Submarine Systems Programme (Contract)
description_raw:
Matchtech are recruiting an Engineering Manager on a contract basis for a major UK defence submarine programme based in Bristol. The role is inside IR35 via the client’s PAYE umbrella. MOD SC clearance is mandatory.

The programme is a strategic capability upgrade for the Royal Navy submarine fleet. You will sit within the Systems Engineering team, leading delivery of mechanical and propulsion systems integration packages.

Key responsibilities:
- Lead a team of 8 design engineers on propulsion system integration
- Own the engineering schedule and report to the Programme Manager on cost/schedule performance
- Manage interface control documents (ICDs) between submarine hull, propulsion, and auxiliary systems
- Coordinate with MOD DE&S and the prime contractor (BAE Systems) on technical baselines
- Deliver engineering review boards and technical readiness reviews (TRR)

Profile:
- MEng or BEng Mechanical / Marine Engineering
- SC clearance held or eligible for sponsorship
- Defence or naval experience essential — submarine systems preferred
- APMP or equivalent PM certification desirable

Rate: £650–750/day inside IR35
Duration: 12 months (extension likely)
Start: July 2026
Location: Bristol — hybrid (3 days on site)
